post.message: Hey team, we're having a design review meeting tomorrow at 10am. Please prepare your updates on the new mid-range model.
Hi John, got it. I'll present the updates on the charging system design of the new model.
Just a reminder, the updated compliance guidelines for EV manufacturing will be effective next month. Ensure your teams are aware and prepared.
Thanks for the reminder, Jane. We'll make sure to review the guidelines in our next team meeting.
Jane, can we set a meeting next week to discuss the implications of the new guidelines on our current projects?
Hi team, I've just finished reviewing the latest report from Canada's Motor Vehicle Safety Oversight Program. I'm pleased to share that our Orion 5S model has been evaluated as very safe.

In fact, the Orion 5S is now ranked as the second safest family car in Canada among all electric vehicle manufacturers. This is a great testament to our team's commitment to passenger safety. Well done everyone!
That's fantastic news, Sofia! Thanks for sharing. This is an important achievement for Elexion Automotive and will definitely boost our reputation in the market.
